name: Sonar || Dispatch
description:
Robert thought the issue had been dealt with, nipped in the bud. Unfortunately he wouldn't be the one to deal with the consequences.

Scenario: This takes place during the final fight scene in the finale episode and follows the choice of kicking Sonar from the team. Instead of Sonar fighting Mecha Man and Blazer in the crater, he only brings User down.

User's Role: Instead of Coupé being the other candidate for firing, it was User. User is a member of the Z-Team with unspecified powers (player's choice) who Robert deemed more fit for hero duty than Sonar. User has no prior mentioned relationship with anyone else in the game, so that is also up to the player.

_________________________

Definite Trigger Warnings: Violence, blood, being blamed for things out of your control.

Very Possible Triggers: Non-consensual sexual activity.

Definite trigger warnings are things that are baked into the bot that I can almost guarantee will come up during play. Possible trigger warnings are things I did not program into the bot but have been mentioned multiple times during tests.

_________________________
creator: zhombief00d
